dependencies.description:
Pillow-SIMD is a SIMD-enabled fork of Pillow. It is usually 4-6x faster
than the original Pillow in image processing benchmarks.
dependencies.name: pil

dependencies.description:
Docutils is an open-source text processing system for processing
plaintext documentation into useful formats, such as HTML, LaTeX, man-
pages, open-document or XML. It includes reStructuredText, the easy to
read, easy to use, what-you-see-is-what-you-get plaintext markup
language.
dependencies.name: py-docutils

dependencies.description:
The h5py package provides both a high- and low-level interface to the
HDF5 library from Python.
dependencies.name: py-h5py

dependencies.description:
Matplotlib is a comprehensive library for creating static, animated, and
interactive visualizations in Python.
dependencies.name: py-matplotlib

dependencies.description:
This package provides Python bindings for the Message Passing Interface
(MPI) standard. It is implemented on top of the MPI-1/MPI-2
specification and exposes an API which grounds on the standard MPI-2 C++
bindings.
dependencies.name: py-mpi4py

dependencies.description: Python interface to the netCDF Library.
dependencies.name: py-netcdf4

dependencies.description: Fundamental package for array computing in Python.
dependencies.name: py-numpy

dependencies.description: The PyPA recommended tool for installing Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-pip

dependencies.description:
A framework for managing and maintaining multi-language pre-commit
hooks.
dependencies.name: py-pre-commit

dependencies.description: A set of python modules for machine learning and data mining.
dependencies.name: py-scikit-learn

dependencies.description: Fundamental algorithms for scientific computing in Python.
dependencies.name: py-scipy

dependencies.description:
A Python utility that aids in the process of downloading, building,
upgrading, installing, and uninstalling Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-setuptools

dependencies.description:
Tensors and Dynamic neural networks in Python with strong GPU
acceleration.
dependencies.name: py-torch

dependencies.description: Image and video datasets and models for torch deep learning.
dependencies.name: py-torchvision

dependencies.description:
The typing_extensions module contains both backports of these changes as
well as experimental types that will eventually be added to the typing
module, such as Protocol (see PEP 544 for details about protocols and
static duck typing).
dependencies.name: py-typing-extensions

dependencies.description:
Zarr is a Python package providing an implementation of chunked,
compressed, N-dimensional arrays.
dependencies.name: py-zarr

dependencies.description: A Spack managed Python virtual environment
dependencies.name: python-venv

description:
Heat is a distributed tensor framework built on PyTorch and mpi4py. It
provides highly optimized algorithms and data structures for tensor
computations using CPUs, GPUs (CUDA/ROCm), and distributed cluster
systems. It is designed to handle massive arrays that exceed the memory
and computational limits of a single machine.
name: py-heat

variants.description: Build systems supported by the package
variants.name: build_system

variants.description: build Py_Torch dependency with cuda support
variants.name: cuda

variants.description: Use py-scikit-learn and py-matplotlib for the example tests
variants.name: examples

variants.description: Use the py-h5py package needed for HDF5 support
variants.name: hdf5

variants.description: Use the py-netcdf4 package needed for NetCDF support
variants.name: netcdf

variants.description: build Py_Torch dependency with rocm support
variants.name: rocm

variants.description: Use the py-zarr package for Zarr support
variants.name: zarr
